name: Figma
description: Figma design platform - look up files, browse comments, and collaborate on designs

credential_fields.name: accessToken
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Figma personal access token (generate at figma.com/developers/api#access-tokens)

tools.name: get_comments
tools.description: Get all comments on a Figma file. Returns comment threads with author info, timestamps, and positions.

fileKey.description: The key of the Figma file (found in the file URL, e.g. for figma.com/file/ABC123/..., the key is ABC123)

as_md.description: If true, return comments in markdown format

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get metadata and contents of a Figma file by its file key. Returns the file name, last modified date, version, document structure, and components.

fileKey.description: The key of the Figma file (found in the file URL, e.g. for figma.com/file/ABC123/..., the key is ABC123)

depth.description: Positive integer representing how deep into the document tree to traverse. Setting this to 1 returns only pages, 2 returns pages and all top-level objects on each page.

geometry.description: Set to 'paths' to include vector data

plugin_data.description: Comma-separated list of plugin IDs or 'shared' to include plugin data

tools.name: find_files
tools.description: Search for files in a Figma team project. Returns a list of matching files with their names, keys, thumbnails, and last modified dates.

teamId.description: The ID of the Figma team to search within (found in the team URL)

tools.name: create_comment
tools.description: Post a new comment on a Figma file. Optionally pin the comment to a specific position on the canvas.

fileKey.description: The key of the Figma file to comment on

message.description: The text content of the comment

comment_id.description: The ID of an existing comment to reply to (for threaded replies)

client_meta.description: Position on the canvas to pin the comment to

node_id.description: The node ID to attach the comment to
